    59→
    60→def slugify(value: str, fallback: str = "session") -> str:
    61→    ascii_value = value.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii").lower()
    62→    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+", "-", ascii_value).strip("-._")
    63→    return slug or fallback
    64→
    65→
    66→def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    67→    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    68→    with path.open("rb") as handle:
    69→        for chunk in iter(lambda: handle.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
    70→            digest.update(chunk)
    71→    return digest.hexdigest()
    72→
    73→
    74→def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    75→    if client != "auto":
    76→        return client
    77→    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    78→    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
    79→        return "codex"
    80→    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
    81→        return "claude"
    82→    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
    83→        return "gemini"
    84→    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")
    85→
    86→
    87→def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    88→    if client == "codex":
    89→        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    90→    if client == "claude":
    91→        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    92→    if client == "gemini":
    93→        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    94→    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")
    95→
    96→
    97→def parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    98→    records = load_jsonl(path)
    99→    session_id = path.stem
   100→    title = path.stem
   101→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   102→    cwd = ""
   103→    branch = ""
   104→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   105→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   106→
   107→    for record in records:
   108→        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   109→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   110→        if record_type == "session_meta":
   111→            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   112→            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
   113→            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
   114→            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
   115→            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
   116→            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
   117→            continue
   118→
   119→        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
   120→            continue
   121→
   122→        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   123→        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
   124→        if payload_type == "message":
   125→            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
   126→            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
   127→                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
   128→                if text:
   129→                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   130→            continue
   131→
   132→        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
   133→            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
   134→            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
   135→            if text:
   136→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   137→            continue
   138→
   139→        if payload_type == "function_call":
   140→            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
   141→            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
   142→            tool_events.append(
   143→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   144→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
   145→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   146→                )
   147→            )
   148→            continue
   149→
   150→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
   151→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
   152→            tool_events.append(
   153→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   154→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
   155→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   156→                )
   157→            )
   158→            continue
   159→
   160→        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
   161→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
   162→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   163→            tool_events.append(
   164→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   165→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   166→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   167→                )
   168→            )
   169→            continue
   170→
   171→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
   172→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
   173→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   174→            tool_events.append(
   175→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   176→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   177→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   178→                )
   179→            )
   180→
   181→    return ParsedTranscript(
   182→        client="codex",
   183→        session_id=session_id,
   184→        title=title,
   185→        started_at=started_at,
   186→        cwd=cwd,
   187→        branch=branch,
   188→        messages=messages,
   189→        tool_events=tool_events,
   190→        source_path=path,
   191→    )

   193→
   194→def parse_claude_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   195→    records = load_jsonl(path)
   196→    session_id = path.stem
   197→    title = path.stem
   198→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   199→    cwd = ""
   200→    branch = ""
   201→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   202→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   203→
   204→    for record in records:
   205→        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   206→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   207→        session_id = str(record.get("sessionId") or session_id)
   208→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, record.get("timestamp"))
   209→        cwd = str(record.get("cwd") or cwd)
   210→        branch = str(record.get("gitBranch") or branch)
   211→
   212→        if record_type not in {"user", "assistant"}:
   213→            continue
   214→
   215→        message = ensure_dict(record.get("message"))
   216→        role = str(message.get("role") or record_type).lower()
   217→        text_parts: list[str] = []
   218→        content = message.get("content")
   219→        if isinstance(content, str):
   220→            text = content.strip()
   221→            if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   222→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   223→            continue
   224→
   225→        for block in ensure_list(content):
   226→            if isinstance(block, str):
   227→                if block.strip():
   228→                    text_parts.append(block.strip())
   229→                continue
   230→            if not isinstance(block, dict):
   231→                continue
   232→            block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   233→            if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   234→                text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   235→                if text:
   236→                    text_parts.append(text)
   237→                continue
   238→            if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES:
   239→                continue
   240→            if block_type in TOOL_USE_TYPES:
   241→                name = str(block.get("name") or "tool_use")
   242→                tool_events.append(
   243→                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   244→                        summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(block.get('input'))}",
   245→                        timestamp=timestamp,
   246→                    )
   247→                )
   248→                continue
   249→            if block_type in TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   250→                tool_use_id = str(block.get("tool_use_id") or "tool_result")
   251→                tool_events.append(
   252→                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   253→                        summary=f"{tool_use_id} output={summarize_value(block.get('content'))}",
   254→                        timestamp=timestamp,
   255→                    )
   256→                )
   257→
   258→        text = join_paragraphs(text_parts)
   259→        if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   260→            messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   261→
   262→    return ParsedTranscript(
   263→        client="claude",
   264→        session_id=session_id,
   265→        title=title,
   266→        started_at=started_at,
   267→        cwd=cwd,
   268→        branch=branch,
   269→        messages=messages,
   270→        tool_events=tool_events,
   271→        source_path=path,
   272→    )
   273→
   274→
   275→def parse_gemini_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   276→    session_id = path.stem
   277→    title = path.stem
   278→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   279→    cwd = ""
   280→    branch = ""
   281→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   282→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   283→
   284→    if path.suffix.lower() == ".jsonl":
   285→        payload: Any = load_jsonl(path)
   286→    else:
   287→        payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   288→
   289→    message_signatures: set[tuple[str, str, str | None]] = set()
   290→    first_meta = find_first_mapping_with_keys(payload, {"sessionId", "chatId", "cwd", "branch", "timestamp"})
   291→    if first_meta:
   292→        session_id = str(first_meta.get("sessionId") or first_meta.get("chatId") or first_meta.get("id") or session_id)
   293→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, first_meta.get("timestamp"))
   294→        cwd = str(first_meta.get("cwd") or first_meta.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   295→        branch = str(first_meta.get("branch") or branch)
   296→
   297→    def visit(node: Any) -> None:
   298→        nonlocal session_id, started_at, cwd, branch
   299→        if isinstance(node, list):
   300→            for item in node:
   301→                visit(item)
   302→            return
   303→        if not isinstance(node, dict):
   304→            return
   305→
   306→        session_id = str(node.get("sessionId") or node.get("chatId") or node.get("id") or session_id)
   307→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, node.get("timestamp"))
   308→        cwd = str(node.get("cwd") or node.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   309→        branch = str(node.get("branch") or branch)
   310→
   311→        role = str(node.get("role") or node.get("author") or node.get("sender") or "").lower()
   312→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(node.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   313→        if role in {"user", "assistant", "model"}:
   314→            normalized_role = "assistant" if role == "model" else role
   315→            text = extract_gemini_text(node)
   316→            signature = (normalized_role, text, timestamp)
   317→            if text and signature not in message_signatures:
   318→                message_signatures.add(signature)
   319→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=normalized_role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   320→
   321→        tool_name = (
   322→            get_nested(node, "toolUse", "name")
   323→            or node.get("toolName")
   324→            or node.get("functionName")
   325→            or node.get("tool")
   326→        )
   327→        if tool_name:
   328→            tool_events.append(
   329→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   330→                    summary=f"{tool_name} input={summarize_value(node.get('args') or node.get('input'))}",
   331→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   332→                )
   333→            )
   334→
   335→        for value in node.values():
   336→            visit(value)
   337→
   338→    visit(payload)
   339→
   340→    return ParsedTranscript(
   341→        client="gemini",
   342→        session_id=session_id,
   343→        title=title,
   344→        started_at=started_at,
   345→        cwd=cwd,
   346→        branch=branch,
   347→        messages=messages,
   348→        tool_events=tool_events,
   349→        source_path=path,
   350→    )
   351→
   352→
   353→def import_transcript(
   354→    parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   355→    root: Path,
   356→    global_root: Path,
   357→    project_slug: str,
   358→    raw_upload_permission: str,
   359→    mirror_to_repo: bool = True,
   360→) -> dict[str, Any]:
   361→    imported_at = normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   362→    raw_sha256 = sha256_file(parsed.source_path)
   363→    session_label = slugify(parsed.session_id, fallback=slugify(parsed.source_path.stem, fallback="session"))
   364→    artifact_stem = f"{session_label}__{raw_sha256[:8]}"
   365→    source_suffix = parsed.source_path.suffix or ".txt"
   366→
   367→    year_token, month_token = timestamp_partition(parsed.started_at or imported_at)
   368→
   369→    repo_root = root / "Memory" / "06_transcripts"
   370→    repo_raw_path = repo_root / "raw" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   371→    repo_clean_path = repo_root / "clean" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   372→    repo_manifest_path = repo_root / "manifests" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   373→
   374→    global_raw_path = global_root / "raw" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   375→    global_clean_path = global_root / "clean" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   376→    global_manifest_path = global_root / "index" / "manifests" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   377→    global_event_log_path = global_root / "index" / "sessions.jsonl"
   378→    global_db_path = global_root / "index" / "search.sqlite"
   379→
   380→    for path in (
   381→        global_raw_path,
   382→        global_clean_path,
   383→        global_manifest_path,
   384→        global_event_log_path,
   385→        global_db_path,
   386→    ):
   387→        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   388→    if mirror_to_repo:
   389→        for path in (repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path):
   390→            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   391→
   392→    if mirror_to_repo:
   393→        copy_file(parsed.source_path, repo_raw_path)
   394→    copy_file(parsed.source_path, global_raw_path)
   395→
   396→    manifest = {
   397→        "client": parsed.client,
   398→        "project": project_slug,
   399→        "session_id": parsed.session_id,
   400→        "title": parsed.title,
   401→        "started_at": parsed.started_at,
   402→        "imported_at": imported_at,
   403→        "cwd": parsed.cwd,
   404→        "branch": parsed.branch,
   405→        "raw_source_path": parsed.source_path.as_posix(),
   406→        "raw_sha256": raw_sha256,
   407→        "raw_upload_permission": raw_upload_permission,
   408→        "repo_raw_path": repo_raw_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   409→        "repo_clean_path": repo_clean_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   410→        "repo_manifest_path": repo_manifest_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   411→        "global_raw_path": global_raw_path.as_posix(),
   412→        "global_clean_path": global_clean_path.as_posix(),
   413→        "global_manifest_path": global_manifest_path.as_posix(),
   414→        "message_count": len(parsed.messages),
   415→        "tool_event_count": len(parsed.tool_events),
   416→        "cleaning_mode": "deterministic-code",
   417→        "repo_mirror_enabled": mirror_to_repo,
   418→    }
   419→    existing_global_manifest = load_json(global_manifest_path)
   420→    manifest = preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing_global_manifest, manifest)
   421→
   422→    if mirror_to_repo:
   423→        write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, repo_clean_path)
   424→    write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, global_clean_path)
   425→    if mirror_to_repo:
   426→        write_json(repo_manifest_path, manifest)
   427→    append_to_event_log = existing_global_manifest is None or existing_global_manifest != manifest
   428→    write_json(global_manifest_path, manifest)
   429→    if append_to_event_log:
   430→        append_jsonl(global_event_log_path, manifest)
   431→    upsert_search_index(global_db_path, manifest)
   432→
   433→    result = dict(manifest)
   434→    result["global_index_db"] = global_db_path.as_posix()
   435→    return result
   436→

   438→def write_clean_markdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: dict[str, Any], path: Path) -> None:
   439→    lines = [
   440→        "---",
   441→        f"client: {manifest['client']}",
   442→        f"project: {manifest['project']}",
   443→        f"session_id: {manifest['session_id']}",
   444→        f"title: {yaml_escape(manifest['title'])}",
   445→        f"started_at: {manifest['started_at']}",
   446→        f"imported_at: {manifest['imported_at']}",
   447→        f"cwd: {yaml_escape(manifest['cwd'])}",
   448→        f"branch: {yaml_escape(manifest['branch'])}",
   449→        f"raw_source_path: {yaml_escape(manifest['raw_source_path'])}",
   450→        f"raw_sha256: {manifest['raw_sha256']}",
   451→        f"raw_upload_permission: {manifest['raw_upload_permission']}",
   452→        f"cleaning_mode: {manifest['cleaning_mode']}",
   453→        "---",
   454→        "",
   455→        f"# {manifest['title'] or manifest['session_id']}",
   456→        "",
   457→        "## Metadata",
   458→        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
   459→        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
   460→        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
   461→        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
   462→        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
   463→        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
   464→        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
   465→        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
   466→        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",
   467→        "",
   468→        "## Messages",
   469→    ]
   470→
   471→    if parsed.messages:
   472→        for index, message in enumerate(parsed.messages, start=1):
   473→            lines.extend(
   474→                [
   475→                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
   476→                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
   477→                    "",
   478→                    message.text,
   479→                    "",
   480→                ]
   481→            )
   482→    else:
   483→        lines.extend(
   484→            [
   485→                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
   486→                "",
   487→            ]
   488→        )
   489→
   490→    lines.append("## Tool Events")
   491→    if parsed.tool_events:
   492→        for event in parsed.tool_events:
   493→            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
   494→    else:
   495→        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
   496→    lines.append("")
   497→
   498→    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
   499→

   501→def upsert_search_index(db_path: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   502→    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
   503→    try:
   504→        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
   505→        conn.execute(
   506→            """
   507→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
   508→                client TEXT NOT NULL,
   509→                project TEXT NOT NULL,
   510→                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
   511→                raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
   512→                title TEXT NOT NULL,
   513→                started_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   514→                imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   515→                cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
   516→                branch TEXT NOT NULL,
   517→                raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   518→                raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
   519→                global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   520→                global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   521→                repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   522→                repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   523→                repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   524→                message_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   525→                tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   526→                PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
   527→            )
   528→            """
   529→        )
   530→        conn.execute(
   531→            """
   532→            INSERT INTO transcripts (
   533→                client,
   534→                project,
   535→                session_id,
   536→                raw_sha256,
   537→                title,
   538→                started_at,
   539→                imported_at,
   540→                cwd,
   541→                branch,
   542→                raw_source_path,
   543→                raw_upload_permission,
   544→                global_raw_path,
   545→                global_clean_path,
   546→                repo_raw_path,
   547→                repo_clean_path,
   548→                repo_manifest_path,
   549→                message_count,
   550→                tool_event_count
   551→            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
   552→            ON CONFLICT(client, project, session_id, raw_sha256) DO UPDATE SET
   553→                title = excluded.title,
   554→                started_at = excluded.started_at,
   555→                imported_at = excluded.imported_at,
   556→                cwd = excluded.cwd,
   557→                branch = excluded.branch,
   558→                raw_source_path = excluded.raw_source_path,
   559→                raw_upload_permission = excluded.raw_upload_permission,
   560→                global_raw_path = excluded.global_raw_path,
   561→                global_clean_path = excluded.global_clean_path,
   562→                repo_raw_path = excluded.repo_raw_path,
   563→                repo_clean_path = excluded.repo_clean_path,
   564→                repo_manifest_path = excluded.repo_manifest_path,
   565→                message_count = excluded.message_count,
   566→                tool_event_count = excluded.tool_event_count
   567→            """,
   568→            (
   569→                manifest["client"],
   570→                manifest["project"],
   571→                manifest["session_id"],
   572→                manifest["raw_sha256"],
   573→                manifest["title"],
   574→                manifest["started_at"],
   575→                manifest["imported_at"],
   576→                manifest["cwd"],
   577→                manifest["branch"],
   578→                manifest["raw_source_path"],
   579→                manifest["raw_upload_permission"],
   580→                manifest["global_raw_path"],
   581→                manifest["global_clean_path"],
   582→                manifest["repo_raw_path"],
   583→                manifest["repo_clean_path"],
   584→                manifest["repo_manifest_path"],
   585→                manifest["message_count"],
   586→                manifest["tool_event_count"],
   587→            ),
   588→        )
   589→        conn.commit()
   590→    finally:
   591→        conn.close()

   594→def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
   595→    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
   596→        return
   597→    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

   600→def transcript_has_content(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> bool:
   601→    return bool(parsed.messages or parsed.tool_events)

   604→def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   605→    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   606→
   607→
   608→def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   609→    if not path.exists():
   610→        return True
   611→    try:
   612→        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   613→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   614→        return True
   615→    return current != payload
   616→
   617→
   618→def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   619→    if existing is None:
   620→        return payload
   621→    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
   622→        return payload
   623→    preserved = dict(payload)
   624→    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
   625→    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
   626→        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
   627→    return preserved
   628→
   629→
   630→def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   631→    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}
   632→
   633→
   634→def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   635→    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
   636→        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
   637→
   638→
   639→def load_jsonl(path: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   640→    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   641→    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
   642→        for line in handle:
   643→            line = line.strip()
   644→            if not line:
   645→                continue
   646→            try:
   647→                records.append(json.loads(line))
   648→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   649→                continue
   650→    return records
   651→
   652→
   653→def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   654→    if not path.exists():
   655→        return None
   656→    try:
   657→        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   658→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   659→        return None
   660→
   661→
   662→def ensure_dict(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
   663→    return value if isinstance(value, dict) else {}
   664→
   665→
   666→def ensure_list(value: Any) -> list[Any]:
   667→    return value if isinstance(value, list) else []
   668→
   669→
   670→def get_nested(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Any:
   671→    current: Any = payload
   672→    for key in keys:
   673→        if not isinstance(current, dict):
   674→            return None
   675→        current = current.get(key)
   676→    return current
   677→
   678→
   679→def extract_text_blocks(blocks: Any) -> str:
   680→    parts: list[str] = []
   681→    for block in ensure_list(blocks):
   682→        if isinstance(block, str):
   683→            text = block.strip()
   684→            if text:
   685→                parts.append(text)
   686→            continue
   687→        if not isinstance(block, dict):
   688→            continue
   689→        block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   690→        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   691→            continue
   692→        if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   693→            text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   694→            if text:
   695→                parts.append(text)
   696→            continue
   697→        fallback_text = extract_simple_text(block)
   698→        if fallback_text:
   699→            parts.append(fallback_text)
   700→    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   701→
   702→
   703→def extract_simple_text(value: Any) -> str:
   704→    if isinstance(value, str):
   705→        return value.strip()
   706→    if isinstance(value, list):
   707→        return join_paragraphs(extract_simple_text(item) for item in value)
   708→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   709→        for key in ("text", "content", "value"):
   710→            if key in value and isinstance(value[key], str):
   711→                return value[key].strip()
   712→        return ""
   713→    return ""
   714→
   715→
   716→def extract_gemini_text(node: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
   717→    parts: list[str] = []
   718→    for candidate in (node.get("parts"), node.get("content"), node.get("text"), node.get("message")):
   719→        parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(candidate))
   720→    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   721→
   722→
   723→def extract_gemini_parts(value: Any) -> list[str]:
   724→    if isinstance(value, str):
   725→        text = value.strip()
   726→        return [text] if text else []
   727→    if isinstance(value, list):
   728→        parts: list[str] = []
   729→        for item in value:
   730→            parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(item))
   731→        return parts
   732→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   733→        block_type = str(value.get("type") or "").lower()
   734→        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   735→            return []
   736→        if "text" in value and isinstance(value["text"], str):
   737→            text = value["text"].strip()
   738→            return [text] if text else []
   739→        parts: list[str] = []
   740→        for key in ("parts", "content"):
   741→            if key in value:
   742→                parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(value[key]))
   743→        return parts
   744→    return []
   745→
   746→
   747→def find_first_mapping_with_keys(value: Any, keys: set[str]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   748→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   749→        if keys & set(value.keys()):
   750→            return value
   751→        for candidate in value.values():
   752→            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   753→            if result is not None:
   754→                return result
   755→        return None
   756→    if isinstance(value, list):
   757→        for candidate in value:
   758→            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   759→            if result is not None:
   760→                return result
   761→    return None
   762→
   763→
   764→def normalize_timestamp(value: Any, fallback: str | None = None) -> str:
   765→    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   766→        return (
   767→            datetime.fromtimestamp(float(value), tz=timezone.utc)
   768→            .replace(microsecond=0)
   769→            .isoformat()
   770→            .replace("+00:00", "Z")
   771→        )
   772→    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   773→        normalized = value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value
   774→        return normalized.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   775→    if isinstance(value, str):
   776→        text = value.strip()
   777→        if not text:
   778→            return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   779→        iso_candidate = text[:-1] + "+00:00" if text.endswith("Z") else text
   780→        try:
   781→            parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_candidate)
   782→            if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   783→                parsed = parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   784→            return parsed.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   785→        except ValueError:
   786→            return text
   787→    return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   788→
   789→
   790→def earliest_timestamp(current: str, candidate: Any) -> str:
   791→    normalized = normalize_timestamp(candidate, current)
   792→    current_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(current)
   793→    normalized_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(normalized)
   794→    if current_dt is not None and normalized_dt is not None:
   795→        return normalized if normalized_dt < current_dt else current
   796→    if normalized_dt is not None:
   797→        return normalized
   798→    return current or normalized
   799→
   800→
   801→def parse_iso_timestamp(value: str) -> datetime | None:
   802→    if not value:
   803→        return None
   804→    candidate = value[:-1] + "+00:00" if value.endswith("Z") else value
   805→    try:
   806→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   807→    except ValueError:
   808→        return None
   809→    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   810→        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   811→    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   812→
   813→
   814→def timestamp_partition(timestamp: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   815→    try:
   816→        candidate = timestamp[:-1] + "+00:00" if timestamp.endswith("Z") else timestamp
   817→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   818→        return parsed.strftime("%Y"), parsed.strftime("%m")
   819→    except ValueError:
   820→        return "unknown", "unknown"
   821→
   822→
   823→def join_paragraphs(parts: Any) -> str:
   824→    cleaned = [str(part).strip() for part in parts if str(part).strip()]
   825→    return "\n\n".join(cleaned)
   826→
   827→
   828→def summarize_value(value: Any, limit: int = 180) -> str:
   829→    if value is None:
   830→        return "none"
   831→    if isinstance(value, str):
   832→        text = " ".join(value.split())
   833→        return truncate(text, limit)
   834→    try:
   835→        text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
   836→    except TypeError:
   837→        text = str(value)
   838→    text = " ".join(text.split())
   839→    return truncate(text, limit)
   840→
   841→
   842→def truncate(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
   843→    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 3] + "..."
   844→
   845→
   846→def yaml_escape(value: str) -> str:
   847→    escaped = value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"').replace("\n", "\\n")
   848→    return f'"{escaped}"'
   849→
   850→
   851→def discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
   852→    requested = clients or CLIENTS
   853→    roots = default_client_roots()
   854→    patterns = {
   855→        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
   856→        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
   857→        "gemini": [
   858→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
   859→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
   860→            "history/**/*.json",
   861→            "history/**/*.jsonl",
   862→            "chats/**/*.json",
   863→            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
   864→        ],
   865→    }
   866→    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
   867→    seen: set[str] = set()
   868→    for client in sorted(requested):
   869→        root = roots.get(client)
   870→        if root is None or not root.exists():
   871→            continue
   872→        for pattern in patterns[client]:
   873→            for path in root.glob(pattern):
   874→                if not path.is_file():
   875→                    continue
   876→                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
   877→                if key in seen:
   878→                    continue
   879→                seen.add(key)
   880→                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
   881→    matches.sort(
   882→        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
   883→        reverse=True,
   884→    )
   885→    return matches
   886→
   887→
   888→def infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
   889→    if parsed.cwd:
   890→        try:
   891→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
   892→            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
   893→        except OSError:
   894→            pass
   895→    if parsed.client == "claude":
   896→        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
   897→        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
   898→        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
   899→    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
   900→        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
   901→    return "unknown-project"
   902→
   903→
   904→def transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
   905→    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
   906→    if parsed.cwd:
   907→        try:
   908→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
   909→            if cwd_path == repo_root:
   910→                return True
   911→            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
   912→                return True
   913→        except OSError:
   914→            pass
   915→    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
   916→
   917→
   918→def project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
   919→    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
   920→
   921→
   922→def safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
   923→    try:
   924→        return path.stat().st_mtime
   925→    except OSError:
   926→        return 0.0
   927→

## Review checklist

   - heartbeat-scheduling.md vs git-policy.md (e.g., auto_push behavior, branch rules)

5. **Ambiguities that would block implementation**:
   - Any "TBD" or vague requirements?
   - Any places where two reasonable interpretations exist?
   - Any spec that says "should" when it means "must"?

6. **Test specifications**: Does TODO.md's testing plan cover the critical paths? What's missing?

Read: TODO.md, SKILL.md, references/heartbeat-scheduling.md, references/global-configuration.md, references/transcript-archive.md, references/git-policy.md.

Report findings as:
- CRITICAL: Ambiguity or contradiction that blocks implementation
- HIGH: Spec gap that a developer would have to guess about
- MEDIUM: Underspecified but reasonable defaults exist
- LOW: Nitpick

Do NOT make any edits. Research only.

1→# Execution Environment
     2→
     3→Use this file when MemoryTree needs to run a bundled Python script inside an arbitrary repository.
     4→
     5→## Goal
     6→
     7→Run MemoryTree tooling without assuming the target repository already has a Python environment and without polluting the repository by default.
     8→
     9→## Preferred Order
    10→
    11→1. Use `uv run python ...` when `uv` is already available on the host machine.
    12→2. Otherwise use a working system `python`.
    13→3. If neither runner is available:
    14→   - for fresh init, fall back to direct template scaffolding from `assets/templates/`
    15→   - for upgrade or detection, fall back to conservative manual review and only make low-risk changes
    16→4. Ask the user before creating a project-local virtual environment, installing Python, or adding Python tooling files to the repository.
    17→
    18→## Why
    19→
    20→- MemoryTree is a repo-level memory workflow, not a language-specific build tool.
    21→- Many target repositories are not Python projects.
    22→- Auto-creating `.venv`, `pyproject.toml`, lockfiles, or other tooling files can pollute the host repository and conflict with its workflow.
    23→
    24→## Fresh Init
    25→
    26→For `scripts/init-memorytree.py` and first-run scaffolding:
    27→
    28→- Prefer running the script through `uv run python` or system `python`.
    29→- If no runner exists, create the initial files directly from `assets/templates/<locale>/`.
    30→- Do not block first-run installation only because Python is unavailable.
    31→
    32→## Upgrade And Detection
    33→
    34→For `scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py` and `scripts/detect-memorytree-locale.py`:
    35→
    36→- Prefer running the script through `uv run python` or system `python`.
    37→- If no runner exists, do not silently create a new environment inside the project.
    38→- Fall back to manual detection using the reference docs and keep the change set minimal.
    39→- If correct upgrade behavior depends on repo-specific policy interpretation, ask the user before proceeding.
    40→
    41→## Stop And Ask
    42→
    43→Stop and ask the user before environment setup when any of these are true:
    44→
    45→1. `uv` is unavailable and `python` is unavailable.
    46→2. Running the scripts would require creating a new `.venv` or installing host tooling.
    47→3. The repo has policies about local tooling, bootstrap scripts, or checked-in environment files.
    48→4. The upgrade is risky enough that manual fallback would be error-prone.
    49→

1→# Git Policy
     2→
     3→MemoryTree must adapt to the host repository. It does not get to override it.
     4→
     5→## Safe Defaults
     6→
     7→- Do not mix MemoryTree-owned changes with product code changes by default.
     8→- Do not stage or push unrelated user work.
     9→- Do not assume direct commits to protected branches are allowed.
    10→- Do not bypass review, CI, E2E, or release controls.
    11→- Keep raw transcript files in the current project's transcript mirror by default, but exclude them from automatic staging unless the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for the current repository.
    12→- Do not mirror or stage transcript files from unrelated projects inside the current repository.
    13→
    14→## Policy Merge
    15→
    16→When the repo already has branch or PR rules:
    17→
    18→1. Keep the repo's stricter rule.
    19→2. Treat MemoryTree as documentation and process support.
    20→3. Only add MemoryTree-specific guidance that does not weaken repo controls.
    21→
    22→## MemoryTree-Owned Files
    23→
    24→Default whitelist:
    25→
    26→- `Memory/**`, except `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for this repository
    27→- `AGENTS.md` only when the file is managed by MemoryTree or the user approved the merge
    28→
    29→If the diff includes files outside this whitelist, stop and ask before staging or pushing.
    30→
    31→## Default MemoryTree Flow
    32→
    33→Use this flow only for MemoryTree-only changes and only when the host repo does not forbid it:
    34→
    35→1. Stage only the MemoryTree-owned files created or updated by the skill.
    36→2. Create or reuse a dedicated branch such as `memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`.
    37→3. Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, but if the host repo enforces a commit convention, use a compatible equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
    38→4. Push that dedicated branch if the repository allows the current actor to push.
    39→5. Open a dedicated PR instead of merging directly into a protected branch.
    40→6. Enable auto-merge only when the repository still enforces its required approvals and checks.
    41→7. If transcript files are included, keep the PR scoped to one repository's transcript mirror only. Do not mix cross-project transcript archives into the same PR.
    42→8. Keep the global transcript archive updated in the same import operation, but never stage or push that user-level global archive as part of a repo PR.
    43→
    44→## Auto Push
    45→
    46→When `auto_push = true` in `~/.memorytree/config.toml`:
    47→
    48→1. The heartbeat process pushes the current branch after each commit.
    49→2. Before pushing, verify that a Git remote is configured. If no remote exists, skip the push and write an alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.
    50→3. If a push fails (network, authentication, rejected by server), retry once. On second failure, write an alert and continue to the next project.
    51→4. On the very first push for a newly registered project, confirm with the user that the remote and branch are correct.
    52→5. Do not force-push. Use only fast-forward pushes.
    53→
    54→When `auto_push = false`:
    55→
    56→1. The heartbeat commits locally but does not push.
    57→2. The user pushes manually or through the interactive skill session.
    58→
    59→Rationale: project memory is a user asset. Local-only storage risks data loss from hardware failure or accidental deletion. Automatic push to a remote provides a durable backup.
    60→
    61→## Commit Guidance
    62→
    63→- Keep the title concise and specific.
    64→- Prefer scopes such as `agents`, `goals`, `todos`, `chat-logs`, `transcripts`, `knowledge`, `archive`, `policy`, or `bootstrap`.
    65→- If a body is needed, keep it lightweight: reason, affected files, and whether the change is MemoryTree-only.
    66→- If the host repo requires Conventional Commits or another enforced prefix, keep `memorytree` visible as the scope or memory tag rather than bypassing the repo rule.
    67→
    68→Example title:
    69→
    70→```text
    71→memorytree(todos): sync active todo progress
    72→```
    73→
    74→Host-compatible example:
    75→
    76→```text
    77→docs(memorytree): sync active todo progress
    78→```
    79→
    80→Example body:
    81→
    82→```text
    83→Reason:
    84→- align the active todo with confirmed progress
    85→
    86→Files:
    87→- Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_003_20260314.md
    88→- Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-14_09-30.md
    89→
    90→Notes:
    91→- memorytree-only change
    92→- no product code included
    93→```
    94→
    95→## PR Guidance
    96→
    97→- Reuse the commit title as the PR title when it still describes the change accurately.
    98→- Keep the PR scoped to MemoryTree-owned files only.
    99→- State whether the PR is MemoryTree-only and whether auto-merge was enabled.
   100→- State whether raw transcripts were included or intentionally left unstaged in the repo mirror.
   101→- Follow the repository's required target branch, review policy, and CI gates.
   102→
   103→## Stop And Ask
   104→
   105→Stop and ask the user before committing, pushing, or opening a PR when any of these are true:
   106→
   107→1. The diff touches product code or files outside the MemoryTree whitelist.
   108→2. `AGENTS.md` has user-managed policy content that cannot be safely merged automatically.
   109→3. The target branch, base branch, or PR destination is unclear.
   110→4. The repository forbids bot pushes, automated PRs, or auto-merge.
   111→5. The repository's review or CI rules conflict with the default MemoryTree-only flow.
   112→6. Raw transcript upload permission for the repository is unknown.
   113→7. The diff includes raw transcripts or cleaned transcript indexes from other projects.
   114→8. `auto_push` is enabled but the target branch is a protected branch that refuses direct pushes.

    21→        "repo_locale": detect_repo_locale(root),
    22→        "system_locale": detect_system_locale(),
    23→        "effective_locale": normalize_locale(args.locale, root),
    24→    }
    25→
    26→    if args.format == "json":
    27→        print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
    28→    else:
    29→        print(result["effective_locale"])
    30→    return 0
    31→
    32→
    33→def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    34→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Detect MemoryTree locale.")
    35→    parser.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Target repository root.")
    36→    parser.add_argument("--locale", default="auto", help="Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn.")
    37→    parser.add_argument("--format", choices=("text", "json"), default="text", help="Output format.")
    38→    return parser.parse_args()
    39→
    40→
    41→if __name__ == "__main__":
    42→    raise SystemExit(main())
    43→

    16→class NormalizeLocaleTests(unittest.TestCase):

    19→
    20→    def test_explicit_zh_cn(self) -> None:

    22→
    23→    def test_alias_en_us(self) -> None:
    24→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("en-us"), "en")
    25→
    26→    def test_alias_en_gb(self) -> None:
    27→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("en-gb"), "en")
    28→
    29→    def test_alias_zh(self) -> None:
    30→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh"), "zh-cn")
    31→
    32→    def test_alias_zh_hant(self) -> None:
    33→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-hant"), "zh-cn")
    34→
    35→    def test_alias_zh_tw(self) -> None:
    36→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-tw"), "zh-cn")
    37→
    38→    def test_alias_zh_sg(self) -> None:
    39→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("zh-sg"), "zh-cn")
    40→
    41→    def test_case_insensitive(self) -> None:
    42→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("EN"), "en")
    43→        self.assertEqual(normalize_locale("ZH-CN"), "zh-cn")

    45→    def test_empty_falls_back_to_system(self) -> None:

    30→FULL_EN_AGENTS = """\
    31→# AGENTS.md
    32→
    33→## Read Order
    34→- Read this file first.
    35→- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
    36→- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
    37→- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
    38→- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.
    39→
    40→## Memory Rules
    41→- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
    42→- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
    43→
    44→## Git Rules
    45→- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
    46→- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes.
    47→- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title: `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`.
    48→- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
    49→- If a diff includes product code, stop and ask the user.
    50→"""
    51→
    52→FULL_ZH_AGENTS = """\
    53→# AGENTS.md
    54→
    55→## 读取顺序
    56→- 先读本文件。
    57→- 读取 `Memory/01_goals/` 中最新的目标文件。
    58→- 读取与该目标绑定的 `Memory/02_todos/` 最新待办文件。
    59→- 仅在需要时读取 `Memory/03_chat_logs/`。
    60→
    61→## 记忆规则
    62→- 当前待办必须与当前目标保持同步。
    63→- 对话日志只追加，禁止重写或删除既有内容。
    64→
    65→## Git 规则
    66→- 遵守当前仓库的分支、PR、CI、评审和发布规则。
    67→- 仅自动提交和推送 MemoryTree 自有变更。
    68→- 提交标题使用 memorytree(<scope>): <subject>。
    69→- 对 MemoryTree 专用变更使用专用分支和 PR；仅在仓库规则允许时才开启自动合并。
    70→"""

    99→class NormalizeTimestampTests(unittest.TestCase):
   100→    def test_unix_float(self) -> None:
   101→        result = normalize_timestamp(1710374400.0)
   102→        self.assertIn("2024-03-1", result)
   103→        self.assertTrue(result.endswith("Z"))
   104→
   105→    def test_unix_int(self) -> None:
   106→        result = normalize_timestamp(1710374400)
   107→        self.assertTrue(result.endswith("Z"))
   108→
   109→    def test_iso_string(self) -> None:
   110→        result = normalize_timestamp("2026-03-14T09:30:00Z")
   111→        self.assertEqual(result, "2026-03-14T09:30:00Z")
   112→
   113→    def test_iso_with_offset(self) -> None:
   114→        result = normalize_timestamp("2026-03-14T09:30:00+08:00")
   115→        self.assertEqual(result, "2026-03-14T01:30:00Z")
   116→
   117→    def test_empty_string_uses_fallback(self) -> None:
   118→        result = normalize_timestamp("", "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z")
   119→        self.assertEqual(result, "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z")
   120→
   121→    def test_none_uses_fallback(self) -> None:
   122→        result = normalize_timestamp(None, "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z")
   123→        self.assertEqual(result, "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z")
   124→
   125→    def test_unparseable_string_returned_as_is(self) -> None:
   126→        result = normalize_timestamp("not-a-date")
   127→        self.assertEqual(result, "not-a-date")

   304→
   305→            parsed = parse_claude_transcript(path)
   306→            self.assertEqual(parsed.client, "claude")
   307→            self.assertEqual(parsed.session_id, "sess-claude-1")
   308→            self.assertEqual(parsed.cwd, "/work/project")
   309→            self.assertEqual(parsed.branch, "feature")
   310→            self.assertEqual(len(parsed.messages), 2)
   311→
   312→    def test_tool_use_extracted(self) -> None:
   313→        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   314→            path = Path(tmp) / "session.jsonl"
   315→            records = [
   316→                {"type": "assistant", "message": {"role": "assistant", "content": [
   317→                    {"type": "tool_use", "name": "Read", "input": {"path": "/a.txt"}},
   318→                ]}},
   319→            ]
   320→            path.write_text("\n".join(json.dumps(r) for r in records), encoding="utf-8")
   321→
   322→            parsed = parse_claude_transcript(path)

   327→class ParseGeminiTranscriptTests(unittest.TestCase):
   328→    def test_basic_gemini_json(self) -> None:

   356→class PreserveExistingImportTimestampTests(unittest.TestCase):
   357→    def test_none_existing_returns_payload(self) -> None:
   358→        payload = {"session_id": "s1", "imported_at": "2026-03-14T10:00:00Z"}

   363→        existing = {"session_id": "s1", "imported_at": "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z", "raw_sha256": "abc"}

   370→        payload = {"session_id": "s1", "imported_at": "2026-03-14T10:00:00Z", "raw_sha256": "def"}

You are a senior software architect reviewing an implementation plan for a Python-based CLI tool.

The project is at D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow. It's a Claude Code "skill" that provides persistent project memory. The team has written extensive documentation/specifications and now wants to start implementing the actual Python code.

## Your task

Review the implementation plan in `TODO.md` for **feasibility, dependency correctness, risk identification, and execution order**. Also read the existing scripts in `scripts/` to understand what code already exists that can be reused.

## Review checklist

1. **Dependency chain correctness**: TODO says `P1 (split utils) → P0 (heartbeat) → P0.5 (session continuity) → P2 → P3`. Is this the right order? Could anything be parallelized? Are there hidden dependencies?

2. **P1 feasibility**: The plan says to split `_transcript_utils.py` (927 lines) into 4 modules. Read the actual file — is 4 modules the right split? Are there other files that need refactoring first? What are the risks?

3. **P0 feasibility**: The heartbeat needs:
   - `heartbeat.py` (entry point)
   - `memorytree-daemon` CLI (install/uninstall/run-once/watch/status)
   - OS scheduler integration (cron/launchd/Task Scheduler)
   - Lock file, config loading, alerts.json
   - Git commit + push automation
   
   Review the existing scripts to understand what's already built. What can be reused? What needs to be written from scratch? How complex is cross-platform OS scheduler integration?

4. **P0.5 feasibility**: Session continuity needs on-demand sync + global index query + model-generated summary. How much of this depends on P0 infrastructure? Could any parts be built independently?

5. **Existing code quality**: Read the existing Python scripts. Are they well-structured? Do they follow the patterns described in the reference docs? Any technical debt that should be addressed before building on top?

6. **Risk assessment**: What are the top 3 risks for this implementation? What could go wrong?

7. **Missing items**: Is there anything the plan should include but doesn't? (e.g., error handling strategy, testing approach, migration path for existing users)

Read: TODO.md, all files in scripts/, and the key reference docs (heartbeat-scheduling.md, global-configuration.md, transcript-archive.md).

Report findings as:
- CRITICAL: Blocks execution, must address first
- HIGH: Significant risk or gap
- MEDIUM: Should address during implementation
- LOW: Nice to have

Do NOT make any edits. Research only.

content.content:
1→# memorytree-workflow Skill 开发待办
     2→
     3→## 背景
     4→
     5→本仓库是 MemoryTree 记忆系统的 Skill 实现，从 `beyondchenlin/memorytree` 独立拆出。
     6→消费端项目（普通项目）通过安装此 Skill 获得记忆管理能力。
     7→
     8→## 当前核心问题
     9→
    10→大模型不可靠 — 会忘记执行 chat_log 记录、transcript 导入等机械性流程。
    11→需要把这些确定性工作交给后台进程，大模型只做轻量的摘要和状态更新。
    12→
    13→## 架构决策
    14→
    15→### 定时心跳（单次执行 + OS 调度，零 token 消耗）
    16→- 全局单实例: 1 台电脑 = 1 个定时任务，扫描所有项目
    17→- 定时扫描客户端 transcript 目录（~/.claude/projects/、~/.codex/sessions/、~/.gemini/）
    18→- 每次执行: 扫描 → 增量导入 → 清洗 → git commit + push → 退出
    19→- 心跳间隔可配置（默认 5 分钟）
    20→- 运行方式: OS 原生定时任务（cron / launchd / Task Scheduler），tmux 仅用于开发调试
    21→- Git 策略: **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆数据安全优先，防止本地丢失）
    22→
    23→### 大模型（对话时才介入，省 token）
    24→- 只写当轮 chat_log 摘要（几行文字）
    25→- 只更新 goal/todo 状态
    26→- 不负责 transcript 导入、清洗、提交
    27→
    28→---
    29→
    30→## 待办任务（按优先级排序）
    31→
    32→### P0: 定时心跳 — 核心阻塞项
    33→
    34→> 验收标准: 全局单实例 heartbeat，OS 定时任务驱动，自动发现新 transcript 并完成导入 + commit + push，无需人工介入。
    35→
    36→- [ ] **运行架构**: 单次执行 + OS 原生调度
    37→  - 核心脚本 `heartbeat.py`: 跑一次扫描就退出（无状态、幂等）
    38→  - OS 定时任务每 5 分钟调用一次
    39→  - `memorytree-daemon install`: 自动检测 OS，注册定时任务
    40→  - `memorytree-daemon run-once`: 手动执行一次（调试用）
    41→  - `memorytree-daemon watch`: tmux 循环模式（开发调试用）
    42→  - `memorytree-daemon uninstall`: 移除定时任务
    43→- [ ] **首次安装触发**: Skill 激活时若 daemon 未注册，交互式询问用户配置偏好（间隔、auto_push、范围），确认后执行 install。询问方式必须兼容所有支持 Skill 的大模型（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件
    44→- [ ] **实现 heartbeat 主逻辑**: 调用 `discover-transcripts.py` 扫描三个客户端目录
    45→- [ ] **增量导入**: 发现新 transcript 时调用 `import-transcripts.py`
    46→- [ ] **敏感信息预检**: 清洗阶段扫描常见敏感模式（API key、password、token），发现时标记警告写入日志（不自动删除，避免误伤）
    47→- [ ] **自动 git 提交 + 推送**:
    48→  - `git status --porcelain Memory/` → 无变动则跳过
    49→  - 有变动 → `git add Memory/` → `git commit` → `git push`
    50→  - **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆是用户资产，本地丢失不可恢复）
    51→  - 首次安装时提示用户确认 push 行为，之后静默执行
    52→  - 提交到当前分支（遵循项目已有的分支策略，不自动创建新分支）
    53→- [ ] **git remote 前置检查**:
    54→  - push 前检测 remote 是否存在
    55→  - 无 remote → 跳过 push，记录到日志，下次 Skill 激活时提醒用户配置
    56→- [ ] **配置文件** (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`，全局唯一):
    57→  - 心跳间隔（默认 300s）
    58→  - 监听目录列表（默认三个客户端目录）
    59→  - 已注册项目列表（自动发现或手动添加）
    60→  - auto_push 开关（默认 true）
    61→  - log_level（默认 info）
    62→- [ ] **运维能力**:
    63→  - 日志输出到 `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat.log`（按日轮转）
    64→  - 锁文件互斥（防止上一次还没跑完，下一次又启动）
    65→  - push 失败时记录到日志，下次重试（网络中断不丢数据）
    66→  - **错误通知**: 连续失败 N 次后，写入 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，下次 Skill 激活时展示给用户
    67→- [ ] **测试用例**:
    68→  - 单元测试: 配置加载、增量检测逻辑、锁文件互斥
    69→  - 集成测试: 模拟新 transcript 出现 → 验证自动导入 + commit
    70→
    71→### P0.5: 跨会话上下文恢复 — 核心用户价值
    72→
    73→> 验收标准: 用户在新会话中说"看看最近的聊天"，Skill 即时同步最新 transcript，定位本项目最近一次会话，输出延续摘要，用户可无缝继续上次未完成的工作。
    74→
    75→**场景**: 用户在会话 A 中讨论了很长时间但问题未解决，关闭后开新会话 B，不想重新描述所有背景。
    76→
    77→**覆盖范围**: 三个客户端（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），支持跨客户端上下文恢复。例如 Codex 会话 → Claude Code 新会话。
    78→
    79→- [ ] **即时同步路径**（不依赖心跳定时）:
    80→  - 用户请求时立即扫描三个客户端的 transcript 目录
    81→  - 增量导入到全局归档（`~/.memorytree/transcripts/`）和项目镜像（`Memory/06_transcripts/`）
    82→  - 轻量级单项目同步，不需要全量扫描所有已注册项目
    83→- [ ] **定位最近会话**:
    84→  - 查询全局索引（`sessions.jsonl` / `search.sqlite`）
    85→  - 过滤条件: `project = 当前目录` + `client IN (claude, codex, gemini)`
    86→  - 按 timestamp 降序排列
    87→  - 排除当前会话自身（避免把刚开始的会话 B 当成"最近的聊天"）
    88→- [ ] **延续摘要生成**（消耗 model token，但价值远大于用户手动重述）:
    89→  - 读取定位到的 transcript（优先 clean，精确确认查 raw）
    90→  - 结合 `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 已有的会话日志补充上下文
    91→  - 提取:
    92→    - 在讨论什么问题？
    93→    - 尝试了哪些方案？
    94→    - 走到了哪一步？
    95→    - 什么没有解决？最后卡在哪里？
    96→  - 输出来源标注（客户端、时间、时长）
    97→- [ ] **On Activation 主动检测**（可选增强）:
    98→  - Skill 激活时自动检测是否有未同步的新 transcript 属于当前项目
    99→  - 有则主动提示: "发现你上次在这个项目有一个未完成的会话（Codex, 2h ago），要查看摘要吗？"
   100→  - 不等用户主动询问，降低使用门槛
   101→- [ ] **扩展查询能力**（后续迭代）:
   102→  - "最近几次的聊天"（不限于一次）
   103→  - "上次讨论部署的那次"（按主题查找）
   104→  - 跨项目查找: "我在其他项目里讨论过这个问题吗？"
   105→
   106→### 跨客户端兼容性原则
   107→
   108→> 此原则适用于所有 P0–P3 任务中涉及交互提示的部分。
   109→
   110→MemoryTree Skill 可被 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等多个 AI 助手加载。所有交互行为必须:
   111→
   112→1. **不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件**: 不使用 Claude Code 独有的 AskUserQuestion 多选框等控件，只使用纯文本对话
   113→2. **提示语言跟随用户/repo locale**: 不硬编码中英文
   114→3. **用自然语言提问 + 等待用户回复**: 所有确认步骤都是"提问 → 等待回答 → 行动"，不依赖 button/checkbox
   115→4. **AGENTS.md 模板中的规则必须是客户端无关的**: 不引用 Claude Code 专有概念（如 MCP、Skill tool 等）
   116→5. **scripts 的 CLI 接口保持统一**: 无论被哪个客户端调用，参数和输出格式一致
   117→
   118→### P1: 代码质量 — 降低维护成本
   119→
   120→> 验收标准: `_transcript_utils.py` 拆分为 ≤400 行的模块；CI 流水线自动运行测试。
   121→
   122→- [ ] **拆分 `_transcript_utils.py`**（当前 927 行，职责过重）:
   123→  - `_transcript_parse.py` — 三客户端解析逻辑（Codex/Claude/Gemini）
   124→  - `_transcript_import.py` — 导入、清洗、manifest 生成
   125→  - `_transcript_index.py` — SQLite 索引操作
   126→  - `_transcript_discover.py` — 文件发现、项目匹配
   127→- [ ] **transcript 去重修复**:
   128→  - 基于 `timestamp + role + content_hash` 三元组去重
   129→  - 补充回归测试（构造含重复消息的 fixture）
   130→- [ ] **CI 流水线** (GitHub Actions):

file.content:
# memorytree-workflow Skill 开发待办

## 背景

本仓库是 MemoryTree 记忆系统的 Skill 实现，从 `beyondchenlin/memorytree` 独立拆出。
消费端项目（普通项目）通过安装此 Skill 获得记忆管理能力。

## 当前核心问题

大模型不可靠 — 会忘记执行 chat_log 记录、transcript 导入等机械性流程。
需要把这些确定性工作交给后台进程，大模型只做轻量的摘要和状态更新。

## 架构决策

### 定时心跳（单次执行 + OS 调度，零 token 消耗）
- 全局单实例: 1 台电脑 = 1 个定时任务，扫描所有项目
- 定时扫描客户端 transcript 目录（~/.claude/projects/、~/.codex/sessions/、~/.gemini/）
- 每次执行: 扫描 → 增量导入 → 清洗 → git commit + push → 退出
- 心跳间隔可配置（默认 5 分钟）
- 运行方式: OS 原生定时任务（cron / launchd / Task Scheduler），tmux 仅用于开发调试
- Git 策略: **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆数据安全优先，防止本地丢失）

### 大模型（对话时才介入，省 token）
- 只写当轮 chat_log 摘要（几行文字）
- 只更新 goal/todo 状态
- 不负责 transcript 导入、清洗、提交

---

## 待办任务（按优先级排序）

### P0: 定时心跳 — 核心阻塞项

> 验收标准: 全局单实例 heartbeat，OS 定时任务驱动，自动发现新 transcript 并完成导入 + commit + push，无需人工介入。

- [ ] **运行架构**: 单次执行 + OS 原生调度
  - 核心脚本 `heartbeat.py`: 跑一次扫描就退出（无状态、幂等）
  - OS 定时任务每 5 分钟调用一次
  - `memorytree-daemon install`: 自动检测 OS，注册定时任务
  - `memorytree-daemon run-once`: 手动执行一次（调试用）
  - `memorytree-daemon watch`: tmux 循环模式（开发调试用）
  - `memorytree-daemon uninstall`: 移除定时任务
- [ ] **首次安装触发**: Skill 激活时若 daemon 未注册，交互式询问用户配置偏好（间隔、auto_push、范围），确认后执行 install。询问方式必须兼容所有支持 Skill 的大模型（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件
- [ ] **实现 heartbeat 主逻辑**: 调用 `discover-transcripts.py` 扫描三个客户端目录
- [ ] **增量导入**: 发现新 transcript 时调用 `import-transcripts.py`
- [ ] **敏感信息预检**: 清洗阶段扫描常见敏感模式（API key、password、token），发现时标记警告写入日志（不自动删除，避免误伤）
- [ ] **自动 git 提交 + 推送**:
  - `git status --porcelain Memory/` → 无变动则跳过
  - 有变动 → `git add Memory/` → `git commit` → `git push`
  - **默认 auto_push = true**（记忆是用户资产，本地丢失不可恢复）
  - 首次安装时提示用户确认 push 行为，之后静默执行
  - 提交到当前分支（遵循项目已有的分支策略，不自动创建新分支）
- [ ] **git remote 前置检查**:
  - push 前检测 remote 是否存在
  - 无 remote → 跳过 push，记录到日志，下次 Skill 激活时提醒用户配置
- [ ] **配置文件** (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`，全局唯一):
  - 心跳间隔（默认 300s）
  - 监听目录列表（默认三个客户端目录）
  - 已注册项目列表（自动发现或手动添加）
  - auto_push 开关（默认 true）
  - log_level（默认 info）
- [ ] **运维能力**:
  - 日志输出到 `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat.log`（按日轮转）
  - 锁文件互斥（防止上一次还没跑完，下一次又启动）
  - push 失败时记录到日志，下次重试（网络中断不丢数据）
  - **错误通知**: 连续失败 N 次后，写入 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，下次 Skill 激活时展示给用户
- [ ] **测试用例**:
  - 单元测试: 配置加载、增量检测逻辑、锁文件互斥
  - 集成测试: 模拟新 transcript 出现 → 验证自动导入 + commit

### P0.5: 跨会话上下文恢复 — 核心用户价值

> 验收标准: 用户在新会话中说"看看最近的聊天"，Skill 即时同步最新 transcript，定位本项目最近一次会话，输出延续摘要，用户可无缝继续上次未完成的工作。

**场景**: 用户在会话 A 中讨论了很长时间但问题未解决，关闭后开新会话 B，不想重新描述所有背景。

**覆盖范围**: 三个客户端（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），支持跨客户端上下文恢复。例如 Codex 会话 → Claude Code 新会话。

- [ ] **即时同步路径**（不依赖心跳定时）:
  - 用户请求时立即扫描三个客户端的 transcript 目录
  - 增量导入到全局归档（`~/.memorytree/transcripts/`）和项目镜像（`Memory/06_transcripts/`）
  - 轻量级单项目同步，不需要全量扫描所有已注册项目
- [ ] **定位最近会话**:
  - 查询全局索引（`sessions.jsonl` / `search.sqlite`）
  - 过滤条件: `project = 当前目录` + `client IN (claude, codex, gemini)`
  - 按 timestamp 降序排列
  - 排除当前会话自身（避免把刚开始的会话 B 当成"最近的聊天"）
- [ ] **延续摘要生成**（消耗 model token，但价值远大于用户手动重述）:
  - 读取定位到的 transcript（优先 clean，精确确认查 raw）
  - 结合 `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 已有的会话日志补充上下文
  - 提取:
    - 在讨论什么问题？
    - 尝试了哪些方案？
    - 走到了哪一步？
    - 什么没有解决？最后卡在哪里？
  - 输出来源标注（客户端、时间、时长）
- [ ] **On Activation 主动检测**（可选增强）:
  - Skill 激活时自动检测是否有未同步的新 transcript 属于当前项目
  - 有则主动提示: "发现你上次在这个项目有一个未完成的会话（Codex, 2h ago），要查看摘要吗？"
  - 不等用户主动询问，降低使用门槛
- [ ] **扩展查询能力**（后续迭代）:
  - "最近几次的聊天"（不限于一次）
  - "上次讨论部署的那次"（按主题查找）
  - 跨项目查找: "我在其他项目里讨论过这个问题吗？"

### 跨客户端兼容性原则

> 此原则适用于所有 P0–P3 任务中涉及交互提示的部分。

MemoryTree Skill 可被 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等多个 AI 助手加载。所有交互行为必须:

1. **不依赖特定客户端的 UI 组件**: 不使用 Claude Code 独有的 AskUserQuestion 多选框等控件，只使用纯文本对话
2. **提示语言跟随用户/repo locale**: 不硬编码中英文
3. **用自然语言提问 + 等待用户回复**: 所有确认步骤都是"提问 → 等待回答 → 行动"，不依赖 button/checkbox
4. **AGENTS.md 模板中的规则必须是客户端无关的**: 不引用 Claude Code 专有概念（如 MCP、Skill tool 等）
5. **scripts 的 CLI 接口保持统一**: 无论被哪个客户端调用，参数和输出格式一致

### P1: 代码质量 — 降低维护成本

> 验收标准: `_transcript_utils.py` 拆分为 ≤400 行的模块；CI 流水线自动运行测试。

- [ ] **拆分 `_transcript_utils.py`**（当前 927 行，职责过重）:
  - `_transcript_parse.py` — 三客户端解析逻辑（Codex/Claude/Gemini）
  - `_transcript_import.py` — 导入、清洗、manifest 生成
  - `_transcript_index.py` — SQLite 索引操作
  - `_transcript_discover.py` — 文件发现、项目匹配
- [ ] **transcript 去重修复**:
  - 基于 `timestamp + role + content_hash` 三元组去重
  - 补充回归测试（构造含重复消息的 fixture）
- [ ] **CI 流水线** (GitHub Actions):
  - Python 3.10+ 矩阵测试（Linux/macOS/Windows）
  - 测试覆盖率报告（目标 ≥ 80%）
- [ ] **集成测试补充**:
  - init → upgrade → import 端到端流程
  - discover 批量扫描流程

### P2: 大模型职责最小化 — 依赖 P0 完成

> 验收标准: SKILL.md 明确标注哪些工作由 heartbeat 负责；transcript 处理段落标记为"大模型不执行"。

- [ ] **更新 SKILL.md On Activation 段**:
  - 明确大模型只负责: chat_log 摘要 + goal/todo 更新
  - 明确 heartbeat 负责: transcript 发现/导入/清洗/提交
- [ ] **添加定时任务状态检测**:
  - On Activation 时检测定时任务是否已注册（检查 crontab / launchd plist / schtasks）
  - 未注册则提示用户运行 `memorytree-daemon install`
  - 读取 `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`，展示累积的错误通知

### P3: 分发与兼容 — 降低使用门槛

> 验收标准: 用户可通过 `pip install` 或 `uv add` 安装；跨平台路径正确。

- [ ] **项目包化**:
  - 添加 `pyproject.toml`（含版本号、入口点、依赖声明）
  - CLI 入口: `memorytree-daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status`
- [ ] **跨平台路径兼容**:
  - Windows: `%APPDATA%` / `%LOCALAPPDATA%` 路径适配
  - 测试矩阵覆盖 Windows/macOS/Linux
- [ ] **安装文档更新**:
  - pip install 方式
  - Claude Code skill 安装方式
  - 各平台定时任务注册说明（自动 install 失败时的手动方案）

---

## 任务依赖关系

```
P1 (代码拆分) ─先做→ P0 (heartbeat 复用拆分后的模块)
P0 (heartbeat) ─先做→ P0.5 (上下文恢复，复用即时同步 + 全局索引)
P0 (heartbeat) ─先做→ P2 (职责最小化，需要 heartbeat 就绪)
P0 (heartbeat) ─先做→ P3 (打包需包含 heartbeat)
跨客户端兼容性原则 ─贯穿→ 所有交互设计
```

建议执行顺序: **P1 拆分 → P0 heartbeat → P0.5 上下文恢复 → P2 职责更新 → P3 分发**

---

## 相关仓库

- 消费端项目: `beyondchenlin/memorytree`（目标 v002 已创建）
- 本仓库: `beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow`

## 现有脚本（可复用）

| 脚本 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| init-memorytree.py | 新项目初始化记忆目录结构 |
| upgrade-memorytree.py | 安全升级已有项目 |
| import-transcripts.py | 单文件 transcript 导入（raw → clean → manifest → SQLite） |
| discover-transcripts.py | 批量扫描三个客户端的 transcript |
| detect-memorytree-locale.py | 检测项目语言环境 |

## 远期愿景: OpenMnemo

以 Gitea 为底座的 SaaS 记忆平台，跨平台 AI 对话聚合 + 语义检索 + Git 版本管理。
项目名 OpenMnemo（来自希腊记忆女神 Mnemosyne），域名和 GitHub org 全线可用。

预研课题（待独立为单独文档）:
- [ ] Gitea API 批量写入验证（POST /api/v1/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents）
- [ ] 多租户仓库结构设计（每用户一个 Git 仓库）
- [ ] 语义检索方案: BM25 (SQLite FTS5) + 向量搜索
- [ ] 浏览器插件可行性: 从 ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini 网页版采集对话

1→from __future__ import annotations
     2→
     3→import hashlib
     4→import json
     5→import re
     6→import shutil
     7→import sqlite3
     8→from dataclasses import dataclass
     9→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    10→from pathlib import Path
    11→from typing import Any
    12→
    13→
    14→CLIENTS = {"codex", "claude", "gemini"}
    15→TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES = {"input_text", "output_text", "text"}
    16→SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES = {"thinking", "reasoning"}
    17→TOOL_USE_TYPES = {"tool_use"}
    18→TOOL_RESULT_TYPES = {"tool_result"}
    19→
    20→
    21→@dataclass
    22→class TranscriptMessage:
    23→    role: str
    24→    text: str
    25→    timestamp: str | None = None
    26→
    27→
    28→@dataclass
    29→class TranscriptToolEvent:
    30→    summary: str
    31→    timestamp: str | None = None
    32→
    33→
    34→@dataclass
    35→class ParsedTranscript:
    36→    client: str
    37→    session_id: str
    38→    title: str
    39→    started_at: str
    40→    cwd: str
    41→    branch: str
    42→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage]
    43→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent]
    44→    source_path: Path
    45→
    46→
    47→def default_global_transcript_root() -> Path:
    48→    return Path.home() / ".memorytree" / "transcripts"
    49→
    50→
    51→def default_client_roots() -> dict[str, Path]:
    52→    home = Path.home()
    53→    return {
    54→        "codex": home / ".codex",
    55→        "claude": home / ".claude",
    56→        "gemini": home / ".gemini",
    57→    }
    58→
    59→
    60→def slugify(value: str, fallback: str = "session") -> str:
    61→    ascii_value = value.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii").lower()
    62→    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+", "-", ascii_value).strip("-._")
    63→    return slug or fallback
    64→
    65→
    66→def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    67→    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    68→    with path.open("rb") as handle:
    69→        for chunk in iter(lambda: handle.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
    70→            digest.update(chunk)
    71→    return digest.hexdigest()
    72→
    73→
    74→def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    75→    if client != "auto":
    76→        return client
    77→    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    78→    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
    79→        return "codex"
    80→    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
    81→        return "claude"
    82→    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
    83→        return "gemini"
    84→    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")
    85→
    86→
    87→def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    88→    if client == "codex":
    89→        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    90→    if client == "claude":
    91→        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    92→    if client == "gemini":
    93→        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    94→    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")
    95→
    96→
    97→def parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    98→    records = load_jsonl(path)
    99→    session_id = path.stem
   100→    title = path.stem
   101→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   102→    cwd = ""
   103→    branch = ""
   104→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   105→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   106→
   107→    for record in records:
   108→        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   109→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   110→        if record_type == "session_meta":
   111→            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   112→            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
   113→            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
   114→            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
   115→            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
   116→            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
   117→            continue
   118→
   119→        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
   120→            continue
   121→
   122→        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   123→        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
   124→        if payload_type == "message":
   125→            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
   126→            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
   127→                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
   128→                if text:
   129→                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   130→            continue
   131→
   132→        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
   133→            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
   134→            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
   135→            if text:
   136→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   137→            continue
   138→
   139→        if payload_type == "function_call":
   140→            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
   141→            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
   142→            tool_events.append(
   143→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   144→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
   145→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   146→                )
   147→            )
   148→            continue
   149→
   150→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
   151→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
   152→            tool_events.append(
   153→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   154→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
   155→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   156→                )
   157→            )
   158→            continue
   159→
   160→        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
   161→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
   162→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   163→            tool_events.append(
   164→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   165→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   166→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   167→                )
   168→            )
   169→            continue
   170→
   171→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
   172→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
   173→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   174→            tool_events.append(
   175→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   176→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   177→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   178→                )
   179→            )
   180→
   181→    return ParsedTranscript(
   182→        client="codex",
   183→        session_id=session_id,
   184→        title=title,
   185→        started_at=started_at,
   186→        cwd=cwd,
   187→        branch=branch,
   188→        messages=messages,
   189→        tool_events=tool_events,
   190→        source_path=path,
   191→    )
   192→
